title: dryas integrifolia subsp. integrifolia
intro: Dryas integrifolia subsp. integrifolia, also known as the dryad or mountain avens, is a flowering plant species in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dryas integrifolia subsp. integrifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
